subcodes.first_line: This is a Book that speaketh with truth, and wherein is mentioned that which draweth mankind nigh unto God, their Creator [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب ینطق بالحق و یذکر فیه ما یقرب الناس الی الله بارئهم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
